headline: Audited 15 pages; 9 have SEO issues — thin content and missing meta descriptions dominate.

recommendations.title: Add meta descriptions to 6 pages
recommendations.rationale: Missing meta descriptions reduce click-through rates from SERPs. Each description should be 120-160 characters with target keyword included.

recommendations.title: Expand thin content on 4 pages (under 300 words)
recommendations.rationale: Pages with fewer than 300 words struggle to rank. Aim for 800+ words on key landing pages with proper heading structure.

evidence: Issue breakdown: missing_meta_description (6), thin_content (4), images_without_alt (3), missing_h1 (1).
